title: Toggle Visibility
description: Toggle message visibility using useReducer with a TOGGLE_VISIBILITY action and conditional rendering.
checklist: Button label switches between Hide and Show

hints.guide: // guide hints: Import: import React, { useReducer } from react
// guide hints: Define TOGGLE_VISIBILITY action type and initialState
hints.code:
const TOGGLE_VISIBILITY = 'TOGGLE_VISIBILITY';
const initialState = { visible: true };

hints.guide: // guide hints: Reducer flips visible on TOGGLE_VISIBILITY
// guide hints: useReducer with reducer and initialState
// guide hints: Conditionally render message when state.visible
// guide hints: Button dispatches TOGGLE_VISIBILITY, label Hide / Show
// guide hints: Export: export default ToggleVisibility;
